published_prior_art.cite: GabrielSachsSjolander2023: joint construction of decomposition-effect bounds matters; the strict-subset claim here is generic affine one-coordinate geometry.
ZhangLiMiaoTchetgen2023 and GhassamiShpitserTchetgen2023 are closest missed proxy nonuniqueness/partial-ID papers; neither states a sharp joint PNDE/TNIE bridge-null line segment.
ImaiKeeleYamamoto2010: natural direct/indirect effects decompose the total effect; proxy-null hyperplane framing is a specialized algebraic sanity check.

structure_flags.label: Bibliography
structure_flags.one_line: The MilesKankiMeloniTchetgen2017 bibliography item is titled as natural direct effect, but the cited DOI/checklist paper is On Partial Identification of the Natural Indirect Effect.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The survey misses ZhangLiMiaoTchetgen2023, Proximal Causal Inference without Uniqueness Assumptions, a directly relevant published bridge-nonuniqueness comparison.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The survey should also discuss GhassamiShpitserTchetgen2023, Partial Identification of Causal Effects Using Proxy Variables, because it is the closest proxy-partial-identification comparator.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1 / Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The notation \Theta_I(P) is used both for the joint identified set and for the marginal TNIE interval, creating a load-bearing clash in §6 and §8.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Rename the joint set, e.g. \Theta_{D,I}(P), and reserve \Theta_I(P) for the TNIE marginal interval.
Add explicit comparisons to ZhangLiMiaoTchetgen2023 and GhassamiShpitserTchetgen2023 explaining why nonunique/proxy partial ID does not already yield the PNDE/TNIE joint line segment.
Add a toy binary latent-table example where the same eta changes PNDE and TNIE with nonzero opposite loadings, producing a visibly non-rectangular set.

recommended_next_step: Revise the bibliography, fix the \Theta notation clash, and strengthen the published-axis comparison before Stage 0.
